hero.sub: Chat one line and it builds you a working app — front-end UI and back-end logic, running live in a sandbox. Publish to the market in one click; anyone can browse, fork, and make their own.

items.line: Done — your signup form is ready. Tap any field to edit.
Dashboard's ready — swap metrics and charts anytime.

items.q: Set up a leave approval flow
items.line: Flow's wired up — reorder steps however you like.
Survey's generated — add or edit questions freely.

works.label: Market
works.title: Market preview
works.subtitle: Apps that started with one sentence — browse, fork, and remix any of them in the market.

items.name: Form Design
items.desc: The first app built with Agentaily: say a sentence, get an online form that collects data. Edit fields by chatting; share a link or QR to fill; responses auto-aggregate.

items.name: More apps
items.desc: Same platform, far beyond forms — pages, tools, and mini-apps will keep landing in the market. Polishing the first one first.

items.name: Your idea
items.zh: Got an idea? Chat it out.
items.desc: Already have something in mind? Say it, and let the platform build it — starts with one sentence. Publish it, fork it, it's yours.

items.title: What is Agentaily?
items.content: A general 'Chat × Everything' platform: chat one line and it builds you a working app — front-end plus back-end, running in a sandbox, published to a market anyone can fork. It's a platform / framework, not a single product.

items.title: What can it build?
items.content: The kind of lightweight apps you can describe in a sentence and assemble by chatting — forms, pages, dashboards, small tools, approval flows… 'Everything' is the direction; we start where a conversation is enough.

items.title: What is a generated app made of?
items.content: Back-end logic described in aml, plus a set of front-end files. The platform runs it live in a sandbox — chat to tweak, preview instantly — and publishes it as a working online app when you're happy.

items.title: What does fork mean?
items.content: Any app in the market can be forked into your own copy, then reshaped with a few more lines of chat — no starting from scratch; build on top of what others already made.

items.title: Is it usable today?
items.content: The first app, Form Design, is already live and usable; the platform and market are still being polished. Want early access, or to build along? Let's talk.
